personas.name: Maria
personas.summary: Single mother of two (ages 4 and 7), Texas. Work hours just cut from 40/week to 20/week at a retail job.
personas.situation_text: My work cut my hours and I'm worried about feeding my kids and paying bills this month.

personas.name: James
personas.summary: 67-year-old retiree living alone in Texas, fixed Social Security income, high heating bills.
personas.situation_text: My heating bill doubled this winter and I'm on a fixed income. I don't know what help is out there.

personas.name: Aisha
personas.summary: 22-year-old college student, part-time job, lives with a roommate in Texas, no health insurance.
personas.situation_text: I don't have health insurance and I'm worried about what happens if I get sick or need to see a doctor.
